idea-plugin.name: Unicode Search
idea-plugin.description:
Search and insert Unicode characters.

This tool window plugin helps you quickly find, copy, and insert Unicode characters and symbols directly into your editor.

Key Features:
  • Search by character name, Unicode block, category, or hex codepoint.
  • Copy or insert characters as raw text, hex, HTML entity, decimal, or character name.
  • Detailed visual preview with hover tooltips showing code, block, and category.
  • Supports multi-word queries, supplementary Unicode planes, and customizable pagination limit.
  • Right-click context menu for quick copy and insertion.
